experience.title: Educational Program Coordinator
responsibilities: Collaborated with faculty to design and implement curriculum for adult education programs.
Performed program evaluations and assessments to measure student success and program effectiveness.
Managed project timelines and deliverables using Trello, ensuring alignment with educational standards.
Conducted data analysis and reporting using Microsoft Excel to support program improvement initiatives.

experience.title: Instructional Designer
responsibilities: Developed instructional materials for online courses in collaboration with subject matter experts.
Utilized Blackboard LMS to enhance course delivery and student engagement.
Assisted in the budget management for educational projects, tracking expenses and forecasting future needs.
